title: The Strange Sound in the Attic
content: Every evening after sunset, strange tapping sounds echoed through the attic. The noise was irregular enough to make the family wonder whether someone had entered the old house. After several days, they invited a carpenter to investigate. He climbed into the attic and quickly identified the cause. As the evening temperature dropped, old wooden beams expanded and contracted, producing rhythmic tapping sounds. The explanation was entirely natural, though the mysterious atmosphere had made it seem far more dramatic.
